decks.notes: This deck focuses on stalling the game with removal spells like Cast Down and Pestilence while generating value with Cauldron Familiar and Troll of Khazad-dûm. The deck utilizes sacrifice effects and token generation from Khalni Garden to gain incremental advantage over time. By constantly churning out threats and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this Golgari/Jund Garden deck aims to control the battlefield until it can overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through attrition.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using Elves as the key tribal creature type. By utilizing mana ramping Elves like Elvish Mystic and Priest of Titania, the deck aims to quickly deploy threats like Lys Alana Huntmaster and Nyxborn Hydra. The inclusion of cards like Quirion Ranger and Timberwatch Elf provide additional utility and power to push through damage efficiently. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help maintain card advantage, ensuring a steady stream of threats. Overall, the deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on maximizing the affinity mechanic with cheap artifact creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. By playing artifacts like Myr Enforcer and Utrom Monitor for reduced costs, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Galvanic Blast and Krark-Clan Shaman provide additional removal options to control the game, while Thoughtcast and Reckoner's Bargain help maintain card advantage. The land base includes artifact lands to further benefit from affinity, allowing for explosive starts and powerful synergies within the deck.

The deck focuses on using Urzatron lands to generate a large amount of mana to cast powerful control spells and recurring creature abilities. It includes cards like Mnemonic Wall and Ghostly Flicker to constantly reuse key cards and maintain board advantage. The deck also features utility cards like Expedition Map and Prophetic Prism to ensure consistent mana production. With a mix of removal, card draw, and counter spells, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and control the game until it can establish a winning board state or virtual lock on the game.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game through the use of powerful and versatile spells like Ephemerate and Snap. By consistently returning key cards to your hand and countering your opponent's threats, you can outlast and outmaneuver your opponent. The deck also utilizes card draw and selection to ensure consistency in your plays. With a mix of creatures for defense and spell control, you can slowly grind your opponent down while setting up powerful combos to secure victory. The key is to stay patient and make strategic plays to maintain control of the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing creatures with powerful enter-the-battlefield effects, such as Archaeomancer and Mulldrifter, along with spells like Counterspell and Dispel to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Ephemerate is a key card that allows for repeated use of these powerful triggers, providing value and card advantage. The deck also includes efficient removal spells like Skred and Union of the Third Path to deal with threats. The mana base is built around snow-covered lands to enable Skred's full potential and ensure consistency in color requirements.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and sacrificing them for value to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By sacrificing creatures like Gixian Infiltrator and Refurbished Familiar, along with spells like Fanatical Offering, the deck aims to generate card advantage and maintain pressure. The inclusion of cards like Writhing Chrysalis and Lembas provide additional token generation and combat tricks to overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Cast Down and Cleansing Wildfire to deal with threats and disrupt the opponent's mana base.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through efficient creatures and direct burn spells, utilizing the Guttersnipe ability to deal damage whenever an instant or sorcery spell is cast. The deck is primarily focused on aggression and burning the opponent's life total down as quickly as possible, with cards like Lava Dart, Lightning Bolt, and Fireblast providing additional reach to finish off the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Sneaky Snacker and Voldaren Epicure to apply pressure on the opponent's board while still maintaining the aggressive game plan.

The main concept of this Aggro-Affinity deck is to flood the board with cheap artifact creatures and use cards like Galvanic Blast and Cast Down to deal damage to the opponent quickly. The deck utilizes cards like Prophetic Prism and Thoughtcast to draw extra cards and ensure a consistent flow of threats. The deck also includes cards like Reckoner's Bargain and Makeshift Munitions for additional removal and reach. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and burn spells, while also maintaining card advantage through its artifact synergy.

This deck focuses on maintaining control over the game by utilizing a combination of creature removal and counterspells, while also efficiently filling the graveyard with cards like Mental Note and Thought Scour to fuel graveyard-dependent threats like Cryptic Serpent and Gurmag Angler. Ponder and Brainstorm help to dig for key cards, while Lórien Revealed provides card advantage. The deck aims to stabilize the board early and control the tempo of the game until it can close out a victory with its powerful finishers.

This Pauper 1 vs 1 deck focuses on controlling the board through a combination of powerful creatures and enchantments. The Gates archetype allows for mana fixing and powerful late-game payoff. Cards like Guardian of the Guildpact and Outlaw Medic provide strong defense, while Sacred Cat and Squadron Hawk offer early aggression. The deck also includes various spells for disruption and card advantage, such as Counterspell and Brainstorm. Overall, the goal is to stall the game, control the board, and outvalue the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board using a combination of creatures and spells, while utilizing Gate cards to generate mana and fix the mana base. The deck aims to stall the game with removal spells like Journey to Nowhere and Prismatic Strands, while gaining incremental advantage through cards like Sacred Cat and Outlaw Medic. By efficiently managing resources and keeping the opponent on the back foot, the deck looks to outlast the opponent and secure victory through attrition.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of cheap creatures and direct damage spells. By playing aggressively and efficiently utilizing burn spells, the goal is to reduce the opponent's life total to zero before they can establish a strong defense. The deck also includes cards that provide additional damage and card advantage to maintain pressure on the opponent. With a focus on speed and consistency, this Aggro-Burn deck is designed to close out games swiftly and decisively.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost aggressive creatures and burn spells. By combining efficient creatures like Kitchen Imp and Sneaky Snacker with powerful removal spells like Fiery Temper and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss helps sustain the aggression by providing life gain. With a mix of burn, creature aggression, and life gain, this deck aims to pressure opponents and seal the win before they can stabilize.

The key concept of this deck is to establish a powerful mana base with the Urzatron lands and use them to generate a significant amount of mana to cast big spells and control the game. The deck focuses on controlling the board with removal spells like Malevolent Rumble and gaining card advantage with cards like Myr Retriever and Prophetic Prism. It also aims to create synergy with sacrificing artifacts for value with cards like Ashnod's Altar and Myr Retriever, while also utilizing cards like Candy Trail and Weather the Storm to gain life and stay in the game against aggressive opponents.

This deck focuses on using the Urzatron lands to generate massive amounts of mana in order to control the game. It includes cards like Chromatic Star and Prophetic Prism to help fix mana and draw cards, while also utilizing cards like Expedition Map to ensure the Urzatron lands are assembled. The deck also includes cards like Golem Foundry and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and deal with threats, while utilizing cards like Myr Retriever and Ashnod's Altar for added synergy and value. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outcontrol opponents through efficient use of resources.
